scripts.build:static: BUILD_MODE=static PUBLIC_SANITY_VISUAL_EDITING_ENABLED=false sh -c 'astro check && tsc --noEmit && astro build'
scripts.build:preview: PUBLIC_SANITY_VISUAL_EDITING_ENABLED=true astro check && tsc --noEmit && astro build
scripts.build:netlify: if [ "$BRANCH" = "staging" ] || [ "$NETLIFY_BRANCH" = "staging" ]; then BUILD_MODE=server PUBLIC_SANITY_VISUAL_EDITING_ENABLED=true npm run build; else BUILD_MODE=server PUBLIC_SANITY_VISUAL_EDITING_ENABLED=false npm run build; fi
